name: code-review
description: Machine-readable sibling of the code-review writeup: PR header, summary, a severity-graded findings array, test-coverage rows, and a sign-off block. Placeholder strings keep the file parseable; the agent expands the findings[]/coverage[] exemplar elements, one per finding/row.

slots.description: Repo + PR identifier line, e.g. 'org/repo · PR #247'.
Extra header meta: author, open date, diff stat.
2-4 sentence summary of what the PR does and why.
Finding severity. The findings array (see shape) carries one exemplar element to clone per finding.
Test-coverage row label (new tests, delta, gaps, CI status). The coverage array carries one exemplar element to clone per row.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.finding[]: { severity: enum[blocker,high,med,low,nit], location: string (file:line), title: string, description: string, suggestion: string }
shape.signoff: { verdict: enum[approve,requested-changes,comment], reviewerInitials: string, reviewerName: string, reviewerNote: string }
